final:
module RefModule (
    input wire D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (WE) begin
        Q <= D;  // Store the data
    end
    // If WE is low, Q retains its value (hold state)
end

endmodule
